name: Yellow Squash Casserole#1
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup green pepper or green chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the yellow squash until tender.
2. Saute the diced onion and green pepper in butter.
3. Prepare the white sauce by combining all ingredients.
4. Add the grated cheese to the white sauce.
5. Mix the cooked squash, sauted onion, pepper, and pimiento with the cheese sauce.
6. Sprinkle buttered cracker crumbs on top of the mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
